title: Fixed `podman-mac-helper uninstall` to remove docker.sock symlink
body:
Fixed to remove not only plist but also `/var/run/docker.sock`(symlink) when `podman-mac-helper uninstall` command is executed.

Fix: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/20650 and https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/issues/5324 .

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fix `podman-mac-helper uninstall` command does not remove docker.sock symlink.
```
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
